scripts.test: npm run test:fix-exported && npm run test:remove-comments && npm run test:file-jsdoc && npm run test:transform-eslintrc && npm run test:transform-packagejson
scripts.test:fix-exported: npx codemod@latest jssg test -l javascript ./scripts/fix-exported-comment.ts --filter fix-exported-comment
scripts.test:remove-comments: npx codemod@latest jssg test -l javascript ./scripts/remove-unnecessary-eslint-comments.ts --filter remove-eslint-comments
scripts.test:file-jsdoc: npx codemod@latest jssg test -l javascript ./scripts/file-jsdoc.ts --filter file-jsdoc
scripts.test:transform-eslintrc: npx codemod@latest jssg test -l javascript ./scripts/transform-eslintrc-config.ts --filter transform-eslintrc && npx codemod@latest jssg test -l json ./scripts/transform-eslintrc-config.ts --filter transform-eslintrc && npx codemod@latest jssg test -l yaml ./scripts/transform-eslintrc-config.ts --filter transform-eslintrc
scripts.test:transform-packagejson: npx codemod@latest jssg test -l json ./scripts/transform-packagejson-config.ts --filter transform-packagejson --allow-fs
